task: Produce an auditable, specialist-reviewable decision packet to close digital-thread traceability gaps for an aerospace part using only the embedded packet provided. Deliver a reproducible workbook or script plus two deliverables: traceability_gap_matrix.csv and quality_closure.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, all intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit documented assumptions (none implied or invented), validation checks, sensitivity analysis (including any 5% sensitivity-triggered expert-review flags), and a final decision table. Follow the named thresholds and rules exactly: do not impute missing values; do not use outside data; remediation options may be combined only if combined cost <= remediation_budget_usd; set expert-review flag when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; perform all calculations using only the embedded packet. Mark unresolved ambiguities as needs_review.
